# STRATOSYNC — Executive One-Pager (Template)

## What it is
Political-Execution Synchronization OS that converts political state, capital readiness, and execution timing into a unified board decision state: GO / CONDITIONAL / FREEZE.

## What it replaces
Ad-hoc judgement, fragmented risk memos, and un-auditable “gut” decisions under geopolitical volatility.

## Core outputs
- Synchronization Score (S)
- Δ-Index misalignment measure
- Hard Freeze safety conditions
- Capital Release trigger status
- Board-ready recommendation + reasons

## Who needs it (BCD)
- Mid-market global enterprises executing cross-border projects
- Politically exposed project operators
- Fund managers needing LP explainability

## Why we win
Synchronization + auditability + governance controls in one system.
